name: ecommerce-health-monitor
description: Multi-tenant health monitor for ecommerce platforms

agents.name: seo-agent
agents.description: SEO health checks: sitemap, meta tags, schema.org, canonical, robots.txt

agents.name: wpo-agent
agents.description: Performance checks: PageSpeed, Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS)

agents.name: uptime-agent
agents.description: Uptime checks: HTTP status, response time, SSL certificate
